2026-03-03PMODepartment of Transport ActAppointment of the Deputy Minister of TransportAppointment of Michael Vandergrift of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Transport, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Deputy Minister of Transport
precis: Appointment of Michael Vandergrift of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Transport, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
